title: Speaking - Part 4
description: Discuss the examiner's questions on the topic.

content.task: The examiner will ask you and your partner questions related to the topic of careers and success.

questions.question: Do you think success means different things to different people?
How has the idea of a successful career changed in recent years?
Is it possible to be successful without being happy in your work?

script.text: Now I'd like to ask you some questions related to the topic of careers and success.
Do you think success means different things to different people?
I definitely agree that success is subjective. For some people it's about money, while for others it's about personal fulfillment or making a difference in the world.
How has the idea of a successful career changed in recent years?
I think nowadays people value work-life balance much more. The idea of working long hours just to climb the corporate ladder is less appealing to younger generations.
Is it possible to be successful without being happy in your work?
Well, I suppose you can achieve external markers of success without enjoying your work, but I think true success includes being satisfied with what you do.
Thank you both. That's the end of the speaking test.
